preconditions: Page should contain username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, back navigation button and home navigation button

testCases.title: Verify login page UI elements are visible
steps: Verify the browser URL matches the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully at the specified URL and the username_textbox, password_textbox, SIGN IN button, back_navigation_button, and home_navigation_button are visible and interactable.

testCases.title: Login with valid username and password
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: User authentication succeeds and the application redirects to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home with the home page fully loaded and the login page no longer visible.

testCases.title: Login with invalid username and valid password
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the user remains on the login page, the browser URL does not change to the home page URL, and a visible login failure message such as 'Sign in failed' or equivalent authentication error is displayed.

testCases.title: Login with valid username and invalid password
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the login page remains displayed, the URL does not change to the home page URL, and a visible authentication failure message is shown.

testCases.title: Attempt login with empty username and password
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected, the user remains on the login page, the home page URL is not loaded, and the form displays a validation or authentication error preventing login.

testCases.title: Attempt login with valid username and empty password
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the application remains on the login page without redirecting to the home page URL, and a visible validation or login error is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks entered characters
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: Characters entered into password_textbox are displayed as masked symbols (such as dots or asterisks) and the actual password text is not visible on screen.

testCases.title: Verify back navigation button redirects to home page
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: Application navigates away from the login page and loads the home page with the browser URL changing to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify home navigation button redirects to home page
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: Application redirects to the home page and the browser URL becomes http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home with the login page no longer displayed.

testCases.title: Login attempt with leading and trailing whitespace in username
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
Enter '  hacklarr  ' in username_textbox including spaces before and after the username
testCases.expectedResult: System processes the entered value and rejects authentication, the user remains on the login page, the URL does not change to the home page URL, and a login failure message is displayed.

testCases.title: Login with very long username value
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
Enter a username string significantly longer than a typical username length in username_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Application safely rejects the authentication attempt, the login page remains displayed, no navigation to the home page occurs, and the UI remains stable without page crash or layout break.

testCases.title: Login with special characters in username
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the user stays on the login page, the home page URL is not loaded, and an authentication failure message is displayed.

testCases.title: Rapid multiple clicks on SIGN IN button with valid credentials
steps: Navigate to the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: System processes only one authentication request and redirects a single time to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home without duplicate navigation, duplicate sessions, or UI errors.
